response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the audio and identified the song as 'Lucky 7th Whistle' by Tokino Sora. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics in Japanese to verify and obtain the full text. 3. Mapped the visual change at 03:37 from the supporter list to the concert hall. 4. Constructed the JSON object with the song metadata, scene breakdowns, and lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video is a concert performance of Tokino Sora's song 'Lucky 7th Whistle' (ラッキーセブンスホイッスル). It starts with a background display of supporter names, followed by a transition to a live concert hall view, while the song plays continuously throughout.

scenes.description: The song 'Lucky 7th Whistle' is playing, accompanied by a screen showing a long list of supporter names against a blue background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ここに宣言します！セブンスホイッスル
ひとつ、やめる時も健やかなる時もずっと
愛を歌い続けることを堂々と誓います
ふたつ、遠くだとかダンスももっと追求します
みっつ、ずっと推してもらえる
アイドルになってみせます
よっつ、不安な未来も私が照らすんだ
それでも落ち込んじゃう日は
思い出しているよ みんなのその笑顔 その声
ハッピーラッキーセブン革命！
サンデイ マンデイ この先ずっと
一緒だよね 約束
ほらね、笑う門には空来る
ハッピーバースデイ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Here, I declare! 7th Whistle!
One, through times of sickness or health, I'll always...
I proudly swear to keep singing love.
Two, for the distance, I'll pursue dance even more.
Three, I'll always be able to have your support.
I'll show you that I can become an idol.
Four, I'll shine upon the anxious future.
Even on days when I feel down,
I'll remember everyone's smiles and voices.
Happy Lucky Seven Revolution!
Sunday, Monday, from here on out forever,
We'll be together, that's the promise.
Look, where there's laughter, the sky comes.
Happy Birthday!

scenes.description: The camera view transitions to a large concert venue with an audience, as the song 'Lucky 7th Whistle' continues to play.
